section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor noted tenderness to palpation in the right lower quadrant.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Tenderness to palpation is an objective physical exam finding and should be documented in the Objective section, not in the Assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of COPD and congestive heart failure.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history is typically patient-reported or chart history and fits better in Subjective; its presence in Assessment is not misleading but is organizationally suboptimal.
